'''tanofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dyadism|dyadism]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-n-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dyadism|dyadism]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tanofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tænefeth|tænefeth]] || [[word:tænefej|tænefej]] || [[word:tænefesh|tænefesh]] || [[word:tænefe|tænefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tanonofoth|tanonofoth]] || [[word:tanonofoj|tanonofoj]] || [[word:tanonofosh|tanonofosh]] || [[word:tanonofo|tanonofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tanofoth|tanofoth]] || [[word:tanofoj|tanofoj]] || [[word:tanofosh|tanofosh]] || [[word:tanofo|tanofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tanoffofth|tanoffofth]] || [[word:tanoffofj|tanoffofj]] || [[word:tanoffofsh|tanoffofsh]] || [[word:tanoffof|tanoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tanofotho|tanofotho]] || [[word:tanofojo|tanofojo]] || [[word:tanofosho|tanofosho]] || [[word:tanofoko|tanofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tanofoth|tanofoth]] || [[word:tanofoj|tanofoj]] || [[word:tanofosh|tanofosh]] || [[word:tanofo|tanofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tanofothol|tanofothol]] || [[word:tanofojol|tanofojol]] || [[word:tanofoshol|tanofoshol]] || [[word:tanofokol|tanofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tanofoothotho|tanofoothotho]] || [[word:tanofoojojo|tanofoojojo]] || [[word:tanofooshosho|tanofooshosho]] || [[word:tanofooko|tanofooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tanofothon|tanofothon]] || [[word:tanofojon|tanofojon]] || [[word:tanofoshon|tanofoshon]] || [[word:tanofokon|tanofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tanofothooro|tanofothooro]] || [[word:tanofojooro|tanofojooro]] || [[word:tanofoshooro|tanofoshooro]] || [[word:tanofokooro|tanofokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|effa290}}
